candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches Total Revenue numerically and is the more direct revenue line.
Also a valid total revenue label, but duplicates Sales exactly in the preview.
Contract asset / balance sheet item, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Advance payments received and deferred revenue
candidates.why: Liability / deferred revenue balance sheet item, not income statement revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list across time; Sales is preferred, with Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Clear direct production/input cost component consistent with COGS.
Also a direct production cost component and should be included for COGS coverage.
Inventory balance sheet asset, not period expense.

variables.notes: COGS is represented by direct production cost components rather than a single subtotal line.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type operating overhead row and populated in the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Wages, salaries, other employment expenses and pensions
candidates.why: Could be overhead-related personnel cost, but may also include production labor; less preferred than explicit SG&A row.
OCI/equity-type item, not SG&A operating expense.
Separate operating expense above Operating income; should also be included in XSGA when not embedded in selected SG&A bucket so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Overhead-related, but likely supplemental/disclosure and not needed when explicit SG&A exists.
Label exists but preview is empty and less precise than the explicit SG&A row.
Balance sheet item, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Accrued salaries, wages and employment costs
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrual, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.
Not present on balance sheet preview as an operating expense; not SG&A.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A row. Added Research & Development because it is a separate operating expense line above Operating income and appears outside the selected SG&A bucket; this lets XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD approximate SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above Operating income; ideal XRD mapping.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line exists and is clearly above EBIT/Operating income.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on foreign exchange rate derivatives
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrow/specific derivative component, not the main interest expense line.
Most semantically correct generic interest expense label; use as first-priority fallback even though preview values are blank.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on other financial liabilities
candidates.why: Core borrowing interest expense component and best populated specific interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on the lease liabilities
candidates.why: Lease-interest component; interest expense but narrower than the main borrowing line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, less preferred than primary statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on other financial liabilities
Interest expenses on the lease liabilities
Interest expense on foreign exchange rate derivatives

variables.notes: Using a priority list for interest expense labels over time. Generic Interest Expense is preferred first, followed by the most relevant populated statement lines.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests because Equity is higher by exactly Minority Interest.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Preferred owner equity line that excludes non-controlling interests; this avoids double counting when MIB is added separately.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, but balance sheet is preferred for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, but balance sheet is preferred for MIB.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label and useful as fallback across time.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list across time.
